params.prompt: Photorealistic editorial interior reference photograph of a Dine. Focus tightly on: dining table, pendant light above the dining area, dining chairs, round light-oak dining table — solid light oak, 48-inch diameter, slim tapered legs, natural oiled finish, oversized woven pendant — oversized circular woven rattan pendant, natural straw color, 24-inch diameter, suspended matte black canopy. Styled in japandi aesthetic, warm_neutral palette, soft_ambient lighting. A calm, warm Japandi interior that balances Japanese minimal restraint with Scandinavian warmth. Prioritize low-profile furniture, natural materials (light oak, walnut, jute), layered textures, and a single cozy work corner for a young family. Keep decoration minimal and purposeful: 2–3 ceramics, one sculptural plant cluster, and a woven pendant as focal punctuation above the dining table. This image is a visual consistency reference — every detail of the featured furniture and fixtures must be clearly visible and precisely rendered. No people. No visible brand logos. Sharp architectural photography. Luxury real estate staging.
